metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the enterprise-crm-and-revenue-operations domain, refactored using the Salesforce capability decomposition from temp-sf.

rootGroups.name: Lead, Account, and Opportunity Operations
rootGroups.description: Core CRM system-of-record capabilities for accounts, contacts, leads, opportunity execution, and pipeline management.

subGroups.name: Account and contact management
subGroups.description: Account 360, hierarchy, relationship, and contact model building blocks.

bricks.name: Account Management and 360
bricks.description: Maintains the core account, hierarchy, insight, and whitespace model used by revenue and service teams.

internalModules.title: Account data management / 360
internalModules.description: Maintains the canonical account profile and account-level customer context.

internalModules.title: Account planning
internalModules.description: Supports account planning and revenue strategy workflows.

internalModules.title: Account early warning system
internalModules.description: Flags account health and risk signals for sellers and managers.

internalModules.title: Account insights
internalModules.description: Surfaces account-level signals and recommendations.

internalModules.title: Account white space analysis
internalModules.description: Identifies expansion potential across products and teams.

internalModules.title: Account hierarchies
internalModules.description: Maintains parent-child account structure and enterprise relationship context.

interfaces.title: Account workspace
interfaces.description: Primary seller and manager account workspace.

brickDependencies.description: Uses trusted unified profile and event context from the platform layer.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Customer Profile.
Writes or updates Customer Contact Point during domain workflows.
Reads Consent Record to support domain workflows.
Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Contact and Relationship Management
bricks.description: Manages contacts, person accounts, contact roles, and relationship structures tied to accounts and opportunities.

internalModules.description: Maintains core contact records and profile completeness.

internalModules.title: Contact roles
internalModules.description: Tracks role assignment inside opportunities and accounts.

internalModules.description: Supports person-account and B2C-style contact models where needed.

internalModules.title: Social contacts
internalModules.description: Adds external social or public profile context where allowed.

internalModules.title: Contact-to-account relationships
internalModules.description: Models multi-account contact relationships and enterprise buying-group context.

internalModules.title: Contact activities
internalModules.description: Maintains contact-level activity linkage for revenue workflows.

interfaces.description: Operator and seller interface for contact management.

brickDependencies.description: Uses the account graph as the parent model for most relationships.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Customer Profile.
Writes or updates Customer Contact Point during domain workflows.
Reads Consent Record to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Contact And Relationship.

subGroups.name: Lead and opportunity execution
subGroups.description: Lead scoring, opportunity work, sales process, seller console, and pipeline control.

brickDependencies.description: Uses access and territory rules during assignment.

rootGroups.name: CPQ, Contracting, and Billing
rootGroups.description: Revenue Cloud-inspired commercial workflows for configuration, pricing, quoting, contracts, billing, and subscription changes.

subGroups.name: Configuration and pricing
subGroups.description: Catalog, bundle, validation, discount, and partner pricing building blocks.

bricks.name: Catalog and Bundle Management
bricks.description: Maintains the product catalog, bundles, variants, and commercial line-item structure used across CPQ workflows.
